name: Maple Leaf Foods Inc.
description: Maple Leaf Foods Inc. is a leading Canadian consumer-packaged food company with a vision to be the most sustainable protein company on earth. Headquartered in Mississauga, Ontario, the company produces a wide range of high-quality food products under various trusted brands, including Maple Leaf, Schneiders, and LightLife. Committed to carbon neutrality, Maple Leaf Foods focuses on delivering shared value through better nutrition, humane animal care, and environmental sustainability. The company operates across North America, providing nutritious protein options while actively working to reduce food insecurity and protect the planet through its purposeful, protein-centric business model.
